8

records.m_Talk_ENG:
That
8ks not it... I think that the occupation forces are the invaders.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me? What kind of nonsense is that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Use discretion and recruit only those who you trust.

H95sy s87{ d87ung quy87
9n h86qn c87wa m95znh v95p ch87_ tuy87Yn nh87}ng ng98~87oi c9580 tin t98~879ng.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Wir m9582gen vielleicht viele Vorbereitungen getroffen haben, aber unsere Feinde haben sich ebenso lange vorbereitet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nous nous pr959parons depuis longtemps ce jour, mais nos ennemis aussi.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Some may already be hiding within our ranks.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Il n'est pas impossible qu'ils aient d959j95p infiltr959 nos rangs.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Especially since you're not a mercenary like us, there are many ways to neutralize you without a fight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Besonders da Sie keine S9582ldnerin wie wir sind, muss es viele M9582glichkeiten geben, sie kampflos zu neutralisieren.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Et puis vous dirigez une 959quipe de militaires, pas comme nous... ce qui veut dire que votre 959quipe peut-95xtre neutralis959e sans n959cessairement avoir recours 95p la force.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The enemy will surely aim for our weak spots.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Der Feind wird sicherlich auf unsere Schwachstellen zielen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: L'ennemi attaquera nos points faibles en premier, vous pouvez en 95xtre s9587re.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Thanks for the advice.

records.m_Talk_FRA: ... Merci pour le conseil.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
After all, that
8ks what makes us strong.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
So... This is how you
8kre gonna shake things up, is it? Very interesting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also ... So wirst du die Dinge aufr9588tteln, oder? 95Zu959erst interessant.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to you, we get to show the superhumans of the Old Administration the power that humans have been preparing all this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dank dir k9582nnen wir den 95nbermenschen der Alten Administration die Macht zeigen, die Menschen die ganze Zeit vorbereitet haben.
records.m_Talk_FRA: J'esp958re que vous regardez ce qui se passe, les super-h959ros de l'Ancienne Administration ! C'est le moment o9585 jamais de vous montrer de quoi nous sommes capables, nous les humains !

records.m_Talk_ENG: Avoid engagement as much as possible and focus on defense until the Enterprise can move.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I
